40.reason: Loop condition should check for EOF to avoid infinite loop; use while(scanf("%d",&t)!=EOF).

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Loop condition should check for EOF to avoid infinite loop; use while(scanf("%d",&t)!=EOF).
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  条件应为 while(scanf("%d",&t)!=EOF) 以确保输入结束时正确退出
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  scanf returns EOF (-1) on end of input, which evaluates to true in C; should use != EOF to prevent infinite loop if input ends unexpectedly
